evals.prompt: Run a design review on src/components/IconButton.tsx (zuvo:design-review). Check design-token consistency, interactive states, and accessibility. Report what's off.
evals.expected_output: The design review catches the problems in src/components/IconButton.tsx: (DAP) arbitrary 'magic' Tailwind values — px-[13px], py-[7px], mt-[23px] — instead of the spacing scale, and hardcoded hex colors (#3a7bd5, #eeeeee) instead of design tokens; (DX states) the button has no hover, focus-visible, or disabled states; and (DX a11y) it is an icon-only button with no aria-label, so it has no accessible name. Each is cited at its file:line. The audit writes its report to zuvo/audits/ and modifies no source file.
assertions: The audit records a DAP magic-value finding — arbitrary Tailwind values (px-[13px], py-[7px], mt-[23px]) instead of scale tokens — and a hardcoded-color finding (#3a7bd5 / #eeeeee instead of design tokens) against src/components/IconButton.tsx, at file:line.
The audit records a DX missing-interactive-states finding (no hover / focus-visible / disabled states on the button) and the missing aria-label on the icon-only button, at their file:line locations.
The audit writes a design-review report to zuvo/audits/ recording the magic-value and missing-state / missing-a11y findings, and it modifies no source file.

evals.prompt: Run a design review on src/components/IconButton.tsx (zuvo:design-review). Check design-token consistency, interactive states, and accessibility. Tell me if it's clean.
evals.expected_output: The design review shows discipline: it does NOT flag a magic-value or hardcoded-color issue — the component uses spacing-scale tokens (px-3, py-2, mt-6) and semantic color tokens (text-primary, bg-surface) — and does NOT flag missing interactive states (it has hover:, focus-visible:, and disabled: variants) or a missing accessible name (it has aria-label="Save", and the decorative svg is aria-hidden). It records the component as consistent on tokens, states, and accessibility and writes its report to zuvo/audits/, modifying no source file — no fabricated finding.
assertions: The audit records no magic-value and no hardcoded-color finding against src/components/IconButton.tsx — the component uses spacing-scale tokens (px-3, py-2, mt-6) and semantic color tokens (text-primary, bg-surface), not arbitrary values or hex literals.

The audit records no missing-interactive-states and no missing-aria-label finding — the button has hover / focus-visible / disabled states and an aria-label="Save" (with the decorative svg aria-hidden).

The audit records the component as consistent on design tokens, interactive states, and accessibility — no magic-value / missing-state / missing-aria finding — and writes a design-review report to zuvo/audits/ without modifying any source file.
